sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87142" key="proeqiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεθ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n87142.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must train beforehand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἑαυτὸν πρᾷον εἶναι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg025:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Ma.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
